stemHtml: In the case of a heavier-than-air aircraft, where on the fuselage structure are the registration marks?

options.a: On each side of the fuselage between the fuselage and wings, or on the upper tail surface.
options.b: On the left side of the fuselage between the fuselage and wings, or on the lower tail surface.
options.c: On the right side of the fuselage between the fuselage and wings, or on the lower tail surface.
